Class ConstraintAwareSyntacticalReplaceVisitor

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.SyntacticalReplaceVisitor
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.quantifierHeuristics.ConstraintAwareSyntacticalReplaceVisitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
DefaultVisitor, Visitor<Term>
public class ConstraintAwareSyntacticalReplaceVisitor extends SyntacticalReplaceVisitor
In KeY 1.x we supported a free variable calculus based on meta variables. This feature has been abandoned in KeY 2.0. Until the strategy for quantifier instantiations is adapted, we cannot get rid of them completely (they are used to determine triggers).
